ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the player (e.g., g, IM, FM) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "federation" TEXT /* National chess federation the player is affiliated with */,
  "highest_rating" INTEGER /* Highest rating achieved by the player */,
  "current_title" TEXT /* Current title of the player */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the player */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile photo */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the player's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_title FOREIGN KEY ("title") REFERENCES titles ("title_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the country (e.g., NOR, USA) */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "federation" TEXT /* National chess federation of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the country's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title (e.g., g, IM, FM) */,
  "title_description" TEXT /* Description of the title */,
  "required_elo" INTEGER /* Minimum Elo rating required to achieve the title */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the title's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizing body or person */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool of the tournament */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players participating in the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the tournament's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournaments" (
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the tournament */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the player participated in */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the player in the tournament (e.g., score, rank) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the player in the tournament */,
  "rating_change" INTEGER /* Rating change of the player after the tournament */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the player-tournament association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game was played in */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., blitz, rapid, classical) */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the game in the tournament */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control used in the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the game record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being ranked */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player at the time of the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the rankings */,
  "rating_change" INTEGER /* Rating change since the last ranking */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the ranking record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "rating_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating history entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose rating is being tracked */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating change */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* New rating of the player */,
  "rating_change" INTEGER /* Rating change from the previous record */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the rating history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, tournament organizer, player) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the user's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription auto-renews */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the subscription record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
